summary: A figure in draped robes holds an unfurled scroll covered in dense burnt-orange text, standing within a geometric stepped border frame.

pairs.see: The figure in simple draped robes with neutral expression
pairs.represents: The deliberate plainness and reserve judgment stance of the analyst

pairs.see: The unfurled scroll covered in dense burnt-orange text
pairs.represents: The side-by-side statutory compilation showing what the law actually does

pairs.see: The geometric stepped border creating interlocking frames
pairs.represents: The layered cross-references and nested definitions in legislative text

pairs.see: The burnt-orange color applied only to the text on the scroll
pairs.represents: Stand-in for the color-coded markup system tracking bill provisions
